current_suggestion.pitch: Roberts hosts EconTalk but his standalone channel covers the intersection of economics, philosophy, and what makes a good life — territory between Ben Felix's rigor and the Stoicism you care about, but through the lens of Hayek, Smith's 'Theory of Moral Sentiments,' and humility under uncertainty. His book 'How Adam Smith Can Change Your Life' gets more airtime here than anywhere else on YouTube. Solo essays and occasional conversations, typically 20–40 minutes, calm and intellectually honest in a way that resists the usual punditry.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
Odyssey of the Mind (William MacAskill / 80,000 Hours)
